title: cordylanthus hansenii
intro: Cordylanthus hansenii, also known as Hansen's bird's beak, is a rare, annual herbaceous plant native to California, USA. It belongs to the plantain family and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Cordylanthus hansenii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been studied for their potential in developing new treatments for various health conditions.
